As a user, 

I want to ensure that the Shipping container identification number text field only accepts alphameric characters on all journeys (CC, PS, NMD)

# Bacground 

## Acceptance Criteria

### Scenario 1 - Upercase letters are automatically converted
Given that I am on any page where Shipping container identification number text field is present, i.e. CC, PS or NMD journey. The field on all journeys is normally labeled with "Shipping container identification number" or similar

- When I enter lowercase letters in the Shipping container identification number text field, e.g. "abcJ0123456"

- Then we should not see any error message, the field should accept lofercase, alphameric characters, and convert to upcase automaticly before printing to pdf certivficete, e.g. "ABCJ0123456"
